description: REQ-003 explicitly states EmptyNoteDiscarded is 'not an error - this is a valid early-exit route' and returns '{ kind: "empty-discarded", event: EmptyNoteDiscarded }'. However, the Error Catalog defines 'SaveValidationError' with variant '{ kind: "empty-body-on-idle" }', and REQ-013 includes this as an exhaustive variant of SaveError. The spec simultaneously treats empty-body-on-idle as both a non-error early exit AND an error variant. The canonical PrepareSaveRequest type in workflows.ts (lines 47-55) places empty-discarded in the success channel of the Result, confirming it is NOT a SaveError. The 'empty-body-on-idle' variant in SaveValidationError is therefore orphaned.
